templates.corporateClean: Professional hero with stats section, client logos and service cards
templates.boldDark: Dark theme with neon accent colors, large numbers and powerful typography
templates.warmOrganic: Warm earth tones, rounded shapes and a natural, inviting feel
templates.glassModern: Glassmorphism cards, gradient backgrounds and futuristic layout
templates.editorial: Magazine-inspired with large images, asymmetric grid and serif fonts
templates.startupEnergy: Green energy vibe with stats badges, testimonials and feature grid
templates.restaurant: Menu-focused with food image styling, opening hours and order CTA
templates.salon: Sleek with booking focus, price list and gallery section
templates.tradesperson: Trust-building with project gallery, certifications and contact form
templates.clinic: Clean medical design with service list, team section and appointment booking

warning.title: Tips before you generate
warning.body1: Are you sure you want to generate a website? Not all businesses say yes, and this can get expensive.
warning.body2: I recommend calling first and trying to arrange making a free demo website for them, then generate after you get a yes. Then sell the website.
